mundo.titulo: Tens of thousands descend on London for rival protests
mundo.resumen: A heavy police operation is in place for the Unite the Kingdom march, organised by Tommy Robinson, and a separate pro-Palestinian protest.

mundo.titulo: Trump warns Taiwan against declaring independence, hours after summit with China's Xi
mundo.resumen: The US president says he wants Beijing and Taipei to "cool down" tensions over the self-governing island.

mundo.resumen: Mengele fled Europe after the war but for years there were rumours he spent time in Switzerland.

mundo.resumen: A guide to the stand-out moments of Eurovision 2026, ahead of Saturday night's final in Vienna.

mundo.titulo: I tried the UK's 'saltiest' sandwich - here's what I learned

negocios.resumen: The aviation watchdog is considering new rules for Heathrow ahead of its possible expansion.

tecnologia.resumen: Lake Tahoe, Silicon Valley's favorite vacation spot, is about to get hit with higher energy prices as AI drives demand for electricity.

Xbox just allcapsmaxxed: Meet XBOX. This isn't a joke; Microsoft appears to be actually rebranding Xbox to XBOX. tecnologia.titulo: YouTube is expanding its AI deepfake detection tool to all adult users
tecnologia.resumen: YouTube is expanding its AI likeness detection program to all users over the age of 18 - meaning just about anyone can have the platform hunt for potential deepfakes of themselves. The likeness detection feature uses a selfie-style scan of a person's face to monitor YouTube for lookalikes. If there is a match, YouTube alerts […]

tecnologia.titulo: Windows 11 tests an adjustable taskbar and resizable Start menu
tecnologia.resumen: Microsoft's latest Windows 11 test will allow you to reposition the taskbar and change the size of the Start menu. The update, which is rolling out to Windows 11 Insiders in the Experimental channel, lets you place the taskbar on the bottom, top, left, or right side of the screen. tecnologia.titulo: ArXiv will ban researchers who upload papers full of AI slop
tecnologia.resumen: ArXiv, a popular platform for preprint academic research, is taking a new step to attempt to reduce the volume of papers that include AI slop. tecnologia.titulo: The Analogue 3D is finally getting save states
tecnologia.resumen: Analogue has released a new firmware update for its Analogue 3D console that adds the Memories save state feature. Memories, which was first introduced with its handheld Analogue Pocket, allows you to save at any moment and resume from that exact spot later on, rather than having to reach a specific point in a game […]

tecnologia.titulo: OpenAI keeps shuffling its executives in bid to win AI agent battle
tecnologia.resumen: OpenAI announced yet another reorganization Friday, consolidating certain areas and making company president Greg Brockman the official lead of all things product.
